history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian boy with dark, styled hair is taking a mirror selfie in what appears to be a clothing store fitting room. He is wearing a light grey crewneck sweatshirt with white Japanese characters printed on the front, and matching light grey sweatpants. His left arm is bent, with his hand resting on the back of his head, while his right hand holds a black smartphone, angled to capture the reflection.

The background shows a white wall on the left and a dark brown curtain on the right. The ceiling has track lighting with spotlights illuminating the area. In the reflection, more clothing racks and displays are visible, suggesting a retail environment. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a well-lit store. The overall color palette is dominated by greys, whites, and browns, creating a neutral and casual atmosphere. The mood is relaxed and youthful, with the boy striking a casual pose. The image has a slightly grainy, natural quality, as if taken with a phone camera in an everyday setting. The style is candid and lifestyle-oriented.
